tagline: Build the perfect cheese, wine, chocolate & nut board — in under a minute.
target_audience: home hosts aged 25-55, wine lovers, cheese enthusiasts, date-night planners, dinner-party hosts, picnic planners, sober-curious hosts choosing non-alcoholic pairings
content_pillars: board builder spotlight — showcase auto-curated boards by occasion
pairing 101 — why X goes with Y (cheese + wine chemistry, complementary flavors)
cheese of the week — deep dives into individual cheeses
wine of the week — deep dives into individual wines, producers, regions
holiday + occasion boards — seasonal curated themes (Valentine's, Thanksgiving, Summer Picnic, Friendsgiving)
host tips — shopping lists, quantity math, presentation tricks
